upstream.name: JetStream 2
upstream.license: Open use; sources at https://github.com/WebKit/WebKit (BSD-2-Clause for JetStream tests)

fail_closed_until: JetStream 2.2 target transcript from an executable V8, JavaScriptCore, or Hermes RISC-V build
JetStream 2.2 workload bundle or browserbench-compatible harness pinned for the captured run
Prototype, silicon, or phone DUT with V8 ready for L5/L6 phone evidence
Optional qemu-system-riscv64 harness is non-claim preflight only and does not unblock L5/L6 phone evidence
DUT capable of running V8 with JIT (Verilator at ~100kHz too slow; need silicon, prototype, or phone)
Raw JetStream target output archived with artifacts.raw_output_sha256
L5/L6 target metadata captures clocks, memory, power, thermal, process, software, and calibration context
